mapper.sql: SELECT grid_code, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time FROM jw_grid_score
mapper.select: SELECT grid_code, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time FROM jw_grid_score WHERE grid_code = #{gridCode} AND score_category = 'overall'
WHERE city = #{city} AND score_category = 'overall' ORDER BY site_score DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jw_grid_score WHERE city = #{city} AND score_category = 'overall'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_score WHERE grid_code IN
#{code}
mapper.select: SELECT gs.grid_code FROM jw_grid_score gs WHERE gs.city = #{city} AND gs.score_category = 'overall' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jw_branch_info bi WHERE bi.grid_code = gs.grid_code AND (bi.del_flag IS NULL OR bi.del_flag = '0') ) ORDER BY gs.site_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_score ( grid_code, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.city}, #{item.scoreCategory}, #{item.positiveDistance}, #{item.negativeDistance}, #{item.siteScore}, sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_grid_score ( grid_code, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{siteScore}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE city = VALUES(city), positive_distance = VALUES(positive_distance), negative_distance = VALUES(negative_distance), site_score = VALUES(site_score)
